mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM role WHERE role_name = #{roleName}

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.phone, u.wx_openid, u.points, u.role_id, u.enabled, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.role_name FROM `user` u JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.role_id
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.user_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user`(username, phone, wx_openid, points, password, role_id, enabled) VALUES(#{username}, #{phone}, #{wxOpenid}, COALESCE(#{points}, 0), #{password}, #{roleId}, #{enabled})
